title: Full Luminia Group Site — Cinematic Popup, Company Cards & Launching Soon Modals

requirements.text: Implement a full-screen cinematic welcome popup shown once per session. It must feature: an animated gold particle shimmer/rain effect on deep black background; the Luminia Group logo (image-3.png) fading in at center with a golden glow pulse animation; 'WELCOME TO LUMINIA GROUP CONGLOMERATE' in gold serif capitals with a letter-by-letter reveal animation; a self-drawing thin gold horizontal divider line below the headline; subtitle text 'A Legacy of Excellence' in smaller italic gold below the divider; a glowing gold 'ENTER' button with ripple effect; and a gold burst/dissolve exit transition when the user clicks Enter.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup appears on first page load (once per session via sessionStorage)
Gold particles animate on the black background
Logo fades in with a visible golden glow pulse
Headline text reveals letter by letter in gold serif font
Gold divider line draws itself across the screen
Subtitle 'A Legacy of Excellence' is visible in italic gold
ENTER button has glow and ripple effect on hover/click
Clicking ENTER triggers a gold burst transition and reveals the main site

requirements.text: Build the main landing page with a consistent black and gold luxury theme throughout — background obsidian/deep black, all typography in gold or ivory, gold accent lines and dividers. Use the Luminia Group logo (image-3.png) in the navigation bar and footer with a black background behind it.
acceptanceCriteria: Page background is deep black / obsidian throughout
All primary headings and accents use gold color tokens
Logo appears in nav and footer on a black background
Overall visual style is premium and consistent

requirements.text: Display all 7 Luminia subsidiaries as premium gold-bordered cards on the main page in a responsive grid. Each card must show the company name, a fitting tagline, and a gold 'Discover' button. Companies and their domains: (1) Luminia Gadgets — watches, headphones, earbuds; (2) Moda Vestra — fashion and clothing; (3) Velocity Vogue — luggage and travel bags; (4) Luminia Captures — wedding photography and professional photoshoots; (5) Assured Tours & Travels — itineraries, train tickets, flight tickets; (6) Luminia TechLabs — web and app development, GST services; (7) GST Service — GST-related tax and business services.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 company cards are rendered in a responsive grid
Each card has the company name, a tagline, and a Discover button
Cards use gold borders and black background styling
Grid is responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop

requirements.text: When a user clicks the 'Discover' button on any subsidiary card, open a full-screen or large modal overlay with a 'Launching Soon' experience. The modal must have: a black background with animated gold border; the subsidiary name in large gold text; 'LAUNCHING SOON' with a shimmer/glow animation; a grid or carousel of relevant imagery for that subsidiary (using the generated images); and a close button in gold.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Discover opens a modal/overlay for that specific subsidiary
Modal has black background with animated gold border
LAUNCHING SOON text has visible shimmer or glow animation
Relevant product/service images are displayed in a grid or carousel
Modal can be closed via a gold close button or Escape key

requirements.text: Use all generated product/service images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in the respective 'Launching Soon' modals for each subsidiary.
acceptanceCriteria: All generated images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated
Each subsidiary modal displays the correct set of images for its category
Images render correctly on all screen sizes

constraints: Use image-3.png (the uploaded Luminia Group logo) as the official logo across nav, footer, and welcome popup
Color theme must be strictly black and gold throughout — no blue, purple, or other accent colors
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Session storage must be used so the welcome popup only appears once per browser session
nonGoals: No backend logic or data persistence is needed — this is a fully static corporate site
No email capture or newsletter forms
No actual e-commerce, booking, or ticketing functionality
No user authentication or Internet Identity integration

required: Gold luxury smartwatch with dark background, elegant product shot (luminia-gadgets-watch.dim_600x400.png)
Premium over-ear headphones in gold and black tones, studio product shot (luminia-gadgets-headphones.dim_600x400.png)
Luxury wireless earbuds in gold case on dark background (luminia-gadgets-earbuds.dim_600x400.png)
High-fashion women's clothing flatlay in black and gold tones (moda-vestra-fashion.dim_600x400.png)
Premium hard-shell luggage set in gold and black on dark background (velocity-vogue-luggage.dim_600x400.png)
Elegant wedding couple portrait with cinematic gold lighting (luminia-captures-wedding.dim_600x400.png)
Professional photoshoot setup with gold backdrop and studio lights (luminia-captures-studio.dim_600x400.png)
Luxury airplane interior first class seat with gold accents (assured-tours-flight.dim_600x400.png)
Scenic train journey through mountains with warm golden hour light (assured-tours-train.dim_600x400.png)
Modern laptop showing code editor with dark theme and gold UI accents (luminia-techlabs-dev.dim_600x400.png)
